caption: The video appears to be a presentation or lecture on the topic of rural community food systems, as indicated by the title and content displayed on the screen. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main focus of the video is a complex diagram or map that illustrates various elements and relationships within the rural community food system. This diagram includes numerous nodes connected by lines, representing different components such as stock, adds to same, subtracts from opposite, and others, as explained in the legend. The left side of the screen contains text with dates, references, and instructions for contributing to the development of this model. The overall setting suggests an educational or informational session aimed at understanding and possibly improving rural community food systems through a collaborative approach.
